items.title: Succession Planning Is Tough, But a Solution for Aging Entrepreneurs Is Hiding in Plain Sight
items.description: Not many business owners have a succession plan in place, but SBA data hints at a smart way forward.

items.description: CEO trust is not granted by an executive title. It is earned.

items.title: AI Could Save Construction $1 Trillion a Year—Here’s How
items.description: More than $1 trillion—around 10 percent of annual construction spend—is wasted each year because of mistakes that require redoing the work.
